content.text: The user said to post whatever state it's in. I'll note the blocker in the test plan and post it now.

input.command: t3 acme e2e post-test-plan --ticket 8568 --env dev --note "DEV verification pending — unable to test: E2E_BROKERAGE_PASSWORD missing. Will verify once credential blocker is resolved."
input.description: post test plan noting the DEV blocker
